tagline: Certified Bay Area Landscape Design and Construction Firm

hero.headline:
47 Years Crafting Bay Area
Dream Landscapes
hero.subheadline: Your backyard should feel like a private retreat. Koch & Associates has been designing and building exceptional outdoor living spaces across the Bay Area since 1978 — pools, patios, kitchens, and everything in between. One team, one vision, from first sketch to final stone.
checkmarks: One team from design to build

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block">Design and Construction
services.subtitle: From pools and patios to outdoor kitchens and fire features, we handle every element of your landscape project under one roof. Our master-builder approach means seamless coordination from concept to completion.

cards.title: Pools & Spas
cards.description: Custom pool and spa design and construction that creates resort-style relaxation in your own backyard, fully integrated with your landscape plan.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Fully equipped outdoor kitchen installations with built-in grills, countertops, sinks, and dining areas designed for year-round Bay Area entertaining.

cards.title: Landscape Construction
cards.description: Full-service landscape construction with our master-builder approach — one source of contact from design through installation for seamless results.

cards.title: Modern Pergolas
cards.description: Stylish louvered pergola installations with adjustable shade and weather protection, adding architectural elegance and comfort to your outdoor space.

cards.title: Backyard Remodels
cards.description: Complete backyard transformations that reimagine your outdoor living area with modern amenities, functional layouts, and premium finishes.

cards.title: Fire Pits & Water Features
cards.description: Custom fire pits for warm evening gatherings and water features that add tranquil ambiance — the finishing touches that make your yard unforgettable.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Schedule a Design Consultation
steps.description: Walk us through your vision. We visit your property, discuss your goals, and develop a custom landscape design tailored to your space and lifestyle.

steps.title: We Design and Build as One Team
steps.description: Our master-builder approach means your designer and contractor work together from day one. No miscommunication, no surprises — just design integrity from start to finish.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Retreat
steps.description: Your new outdoor living space is ready to enjoy. From the pool to the patio, every detail reflects 47 years of Bay Area craftsmanship and care.

about.label: Why Bay Area Families Choose Us
about.headline: Second-Generation Builders. First-Class Results.
about.description: Founded in 1978 by the Koch family, we are one of the Bay Area's longest-running landscape construction firms. Now led by second-generation owner Garrett Koch, we bring nearly five decades of craftsmanship, relationships, and local knowledge to every project. Our Diamond Certified status — earned seven consecutive years — means we have been independently verified for quality by the homeowners we serve.

features.title: Master-Builder Approach
features.description: One team handles both design and construction, ensuring your vision is executed with precision from first sketch to final walkthrough.

features.title: 47 Years of Bay Area Expertise
features.description: Since 1978, we have built lasting relationships and deep local knowledge across Fremont, San Jose, San Mateo, and surrounding communities.

features.title: Diamond Certified Quality
features.description: Independently rated by American Ratings Corporation. Seven consecutive years of top marks from verified homeowner surveys.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Exceptional Value.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. We provide detailed proposals with clear scope, fair pricing, and no hidden costs — so you know exactly what to expect.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every project we build is backed by our commitment to lasting quality. If anything does not meet the standard you expected, we will return and make it right at no additional cost. After 47 years, our reputation is our most valuable asset — and we protect it on every job.

faqs.question: How long does a typical landscape project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope. A backyard remodel typically takes 6-10 weeks, while a full landscape with pool construction may take 3-5 months. We provide a detailed timeline during the design phase so you always know what to expect.

faqs.question: Do you handle both design and construction?
faqs.answer: Yes — that is our specialty. Our master-builder approach means one team manages your project from initial design through final construction. This eliminates miscommunication between separate firms and ensures design integrity throughout.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Bay Area from three offices in Fremont, San Jose, and San Mateo. Our coverage includes Santa Clara, San Mateo, and Alameda Counties — communities like Palo Alto, Los Gatos, Saratoga, Mountain View, and beyond.

faqs.question: What does Diamond Certified mean?
faqs.answer: Diamond Certified is an independent rating awarded by American Ratings Corporation. It means we have been top-rated in customer satisfaction surveys for seven consecutive years. Only the highest-rated companies earn this distinction.

faqs.question: Can you work with an existing landscape or pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Many of our projects involve remodeling existing outdoor spaces. Whether you want to renovate a dated pool, add an outdoor kitchen to your current patio, or completely reimagine your backyard, we tailor the scope to your needs.

testimonials.name: Peter S.
testimonials.text: If you have a landscape project, hire Koch & Associates. They listen, design, discuss, get agreement then execute beautifully.

testimonials.name: Cricket L.
testimonials.text: We had a wonderful experience with Koch & Associates. We're incredibly happy with our pool, deck, and fire pit results.

testimonials.name: Allen R.
testimonials.text: Very high-quality professional workmanship. I highly recommend them to all my friends.
